description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a rectangular white backing panel and a series of evenly spaced, horizontal metallic tubes forming the heating element. The tubes are arranged in a ladder-like pattern, with each tube slightly curved outward from the wall, maximizing surface area for heat dissipation. The metallic finish of the tubes contrasts with the matte white panel, giving the radiator a sleek and contemporary appearance. The radiator is relatively slim in profile, projecting only a short distance from the wall, and appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel or aluminum, for efficient heat transfer. No visible valves or control knobs are present on the front or sides, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall look is functional yet stylish, suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or public buildings.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal metallic tubes on a white rectangular panel, featuring a modern ladder-like design. The radiator is slim and minimalist, with a metallic finish contrasting against the matte white backing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of horizontal metallic tubes on a white rectangular panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and outward curvature of the metallic tubes from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white backing panel with no visible heating elements or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the protrusion of the metallic tubes.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; likely concealed or rear entry
